I think it still would make sense, I guess.
I mean, maybe to start, like, would you be able to describe just like, in general, who drives certain things on the team currently?
Because I think we had a lot of folks on the call.

think it's...

Developers.

All of the developer-facing work is done under Kira's leadership.
I specifically oversee the developer relations team.

So like HubSpot has an app, for example.

And, you know, they'll post in forums.
We also have a Slack channel.
And then all of the content that you see on developers.flopflow.com, all of the developer content, I oversee that as well.
I have one person who is our documentation lead who kind of works with engineering to write that out.
We, you know, for something that's more technical, more like API reference, engineering puts in quite a bit of work there.
I watch this out, but all the guides that you see that we do, or she does actually for the most part.
Okay, that's very helpful.

Yeah, so we have a couple of product marketing.
managers who work with us.

so he's talked about that quite a bit.

I that's the more clear-cut, you know, work.

Like, I think that's the more clear-cut one.

Absolutely.
That's why I think it's worth the brainstorm session.

Like, that's the problem.

I think it's, like, impossible to turn the ship in two months, but, like, I want to make, like, a lot of progress.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on Webflow developer content initiatives and align on next steps for integration pages and developer awareness efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Integration page content creation is moving forward; Anushri to review sample and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [New developer-focused content hub proposed to drive awareness; concept positively received but needs further discussion](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Webflow lacks clear ownership and strategy for developer marketing content; opportunity to fill this gap](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Technical implementation details (e.g., using Webflow as headless CMS) to be explored in follow-up discussions](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)

## Topics

### Integration Page Content

  - [Sample integration article created for calibration; Anushri to review and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Goal: Align on format, then scale to 5-10 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Current integration page lacks clear ownership; opportunity to improve and maintain](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Emphasis on linking to official docs and apps when possible to reduce maintenance burden](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Next steps:](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
    1.  Jason to provide list of top 5-10 integrations to prioritize
    2.  Anushri to determine page ownership and access for content updates

### Developer Awareness Initiative

  - [Proposal: Create a dedicated developer content hub (e.g., developers.webflow.com/learn)](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Aims to clearly communicate Webflow's value proposition for developers](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Inspiration drawn from Stripe's developer-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Content to include topics like headless CMS, technical website building, and code snippets](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [Challenges:](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
    1.  No current home for developer-focused marketing content
    2.  Existing blog and glossary not tailored for technical audience
  - [Next steps:](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
    1.  Jason to create higher-fidelity mockup and sample content
    2.  Anushri to discuss concept with Kirat and internal design team
    3.  Explore technical implementation options (Webflow as headless CMS vs. existing stack)

### Content Ownership and Resources

  - [Anushri oversees developer relations team and developer-facing content](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Current resources:](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
    1.  One documentation lead working with engineering
    2.  Limited developer marketing resources; team creating own content
  - [GrowthX to help fill gap in developer-focused content creation](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Anushri to review integration page sample and provide feedback by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/r19o3E7NKT1642mySy2UiXgLNVavQMmW?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
